mapper.select:
select * from lab_course c left join lab_sub l on c.lab_id = l.id where c.is_deleted = 0 and l.is_deleted = 0
and c.name like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%')
and c.teacher like concat('%', #{teacher}, '%')
and c.lab_id = #{labId}
order by c.update_time desc

SELECT course.id, course.name, course.teacher, course.up_time, course.down_time, lab.lab_name FROM lab_course course LEFT JOIN lab_sub lab ON course.lab_id = lab.id WHERE course.is_deleted = 0 AND lab.is_deleted = 0;
